name: Linda George
description:
'''Linda George'''  ({{langx|syr|ܠܢܕܐ ܓ̰ܘܪܓ̰}};{{efn|Sometimes written {{lang|syr|ܠܝܢܕܐ ܓ̰ܘܪܓ̰}}.}} born 11 February 1964) is an [[Assyrian people|Assyrian]]-[[United States|American]] singer known for her [[sentimental ballad]]s and dance songs. The vast majority of her songs are sung in her native [[Assyrian Neo-Aramaic]] dialect, though a few are in [[English language|English]], [[Surayt]], and [[Arabic]]. She has written the lyrics for many of her songs.

George is one of the most well-known and ubiquitous Assyrian singers, having toured the continents of Oceania, Europe and Asia. Furthermore, she is the most [[Facebook like button|liked]] Assyrian figure on [[Facebook]]. In 2010, [[Esquire (magazine)|''Esquire'']] magazine chose George as the representative from Iraq in a special, 194-nation edition of their [[Esquire (magazine)#Sexiest Woman Alive|Sexiest Woman Alive]] feature.
